summary: Design or refresh a performance review cycle with evaluation frameworks, calibration processes, and growth plan templates.

inputs.name: role_family
inputs.description: Role families, levels, and evaluation dimensions.

inputs.name: review_cycle
inputs.description: Review frequency, timeline, and stakeholder roles.

inputs.name: framework_goal
inputs.description: Framework objectives, calibration needs, or growth focus areas.

outputs.name: review_framework
outputs.description: Evaluation criteria, rating scales, and review templates.

outputs.name: calibration_process
outputs.description: Calibration session design, facilitation guide, and consistency checks.

outputs.name: growth_plan_template
outputs.description: Individual development plan template with goal-setting structure.

budget.notes: High-stakes workflow. Preserve fairness, consistency, and human decision ownership.

gates.rule: Confirm the request is review cycle design, not individual employee evaluation or legal advice.
Require role family and review cycle context before drafting framework.
Mark outputs as decision-support artifacts and include a human manager checkpoint.
Return clear review framework and note where individual outcomes need human approval.

steps.action: Set evaluation dimensions, rating scales, and role-specific criteria.
Create calibration session structure, facilitation guide, and consistency checks.
Design individual development plan template with goal-setting and milestone structure.
Merge framework, calibration process, and growth plan into one reviewer-ready pack.

tools.name: filesystem.read
tools.purpose: Read role profiles, existing review frameworks, and calibration notes.

tools.name: filesystem.write
tools.purpose: Write review cycle pack when requested.

verification.method: Check the framework names evaluation dimensions and rating scales.
Check calibration session design and consistency checks are present.
Check individual outcomes are explicitly human-owned.

success_criteria: The review cycle can be executed without guessing evaluation criteria or calibration steps.
Calibration guidance is structured enough to ensure consistency across managers.
The output clearly states that individual performance outcomes remain with human managers.

rollback.when: If the framework omits evaluation criteria or calibration, revert to role family and rebuild.
